overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player traverses elevated walkways, passes a sleek black sports car, descends stairs through a building lobby, and emerges into an open plaza with grass and holographic advertisements.

moving from darker covered area into brighter neon-lit section

large illuminated advertisement panel with cyan-green neon text

metal staircase with illuminated edges leading upward

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered elevated walkway at night, illuminated by cyan neon signs. The player ascends a metal staircase, passing green-lit advertisement panels, with the distant 'softsys' tower visible ahead. The environment is devoid of pedestrians, featuring wet concrete surfaces and glass building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban roadway with digital billboards

events.description: black sports car enters frame from the right side of the road
sports car drives alongside the player on the elevated roadway

agents.ego_description: walking parallel to a black sports car on an elevated roadway, passing large curved digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car driving alongside the player with illuminated wheel rims

entered.detail: futuristic black sports car with glowing wheels and streamlined body
massive curved digital screen displaying colorful advertisements
wet asphalt road surface with reflective lane markings

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an open elevated roadway at night, where a sleek black sports car appears and drives alongside. Large curved digital billboards illuminate the right side while the distant softsys tower remains visible on the left. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights as the vehicle paces the player's movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: building facade walkway with horizontal neon strips

events.description: turning left to follow the curved walkway around the building
sports car exits frame, view opens to building facade with horizontal lights

agents.ego_description: turning left along the walkway, moving past the car and focusing on the building with horizontal neon lights

entered.detail: building facade with rows of green and yellow illuminated horizontal windows

segments.scene_description: The player turns left along the elevated walkway as the sports car drives away and exits the frame. The scene shifts to focus on a building facade featuring distinctive horizontal strips of green and yellow neon lights. The softsys tower remains visible in the center distance as the player continues along the curved path.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance lobby with glass doors and reflective floors

events.description: descending stairs from elevated walkway to ground level entrance
entering building lobby through automatic glass doors

agents.ego_description: descending metal stairs, entering a building lobby with reflective marble floors and pink neon ceiling lighting

entered.detail: metal staircase with glass railings leading down to ground level
automatic glass doors with illuminated frames leading into the building
highly polished marble floor reflecting the pink and green neon ceiling lights
glass security enclosure with 'SECURITY' text visible on the window

segments.scene_description: The player descends a metal staircase from the elevated walkway, transitioning to ground level. They enter a building lobby featuring automatic glass doors, a glass security booth, and highly reflective marble floors that mirror the pink and green neon ceiling lighting. The softsys tower remains visible through the glass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with grass lawns and illuminated pathways

events.description: exiting building into open plaza with grass lawns and trees
turning right to follow the curved illuminated pathway

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza with manicured grass lawns, passing trees and cyan illuminated ground strips, heading toward distant buildings

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking across the plaza toward the buildings

entered.detail: manicured grass area with mature trees and uplighting
walkway with embedded cyan neon light strips along the edge
mature trees with warm uplighting in the plaza grass
floating holographic advertisement signs above building entrances

segments.scene_description: The player exits the building into a spacious urban plaza featuring manicured grass lawns, mature trees with uplighting, and pathways with embedded cyan neon strips. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding building lights and holographic advertisements. A few distant pedestrians are visible as the player turns right to follow the curved path, with the softsys tower still dominating the center skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic neon-lit walkway down into a sprawling, high-tech urban plaza. It begins by ascending a metal staircase under cyan neon signs and green advertisement panels, moving through a desolate environment of wet concrete and glass facades toward the distant softsys tower. As the camera emerges onto an open elevated roadway, a sleek black sports car paces the movement alongside curved digital billboards before driving away, allowing the view to shift toward a building facade accented with horizontal green and yellow lights. The scene then transitions downward as the camera descends another staircase and passes through a building lobby with reflective marble floors and pink and green ceiling lights. Finally, the movement opens up into a spacious plaza featuring manicured grass, uplighted trees, and holographic advertisements, with the softsys tower remaining a constant landmark in the center skyline.
